name: Custom Name Keychain
description: Personalized keychain with your name or logo
fullDesc: Fully customizable keychain printed in durable PLA. Choose your name, initials, or a short message. Available in 10+ colors. Perfect for gifting or corporate branding. Each piece is sanded and finished for a smooth feel.

name: Miniature Building Model
description: Detailed scale model of any building or structure
fullDesc: High-detail architectural scale models built from your blueprints or reference images. Ideal for real estate presentations, urban planning, and exhibitions. Printed in multiple parts and assembled with precision. Custom scale available on request.

name: Desk Organizer Set
description: Modular desk organizer for pens, cards, and accessories
fullDesc: A modular 3-piece desk organizer set designed for clean, minimal workspaces. Holds pens, business cards, sticky notes, and small accessories. Printed in matte finish PLA. Available in white, black, and grey.

name: Functional Gear Assembly
description: Custom gear sets and mechanical assemblies
fullDesc: Precision-printed gear assemblies for prototyping and light industrial use. Printed in PETG for strength and heat resistance. Custom tooth profiles, module sizes, and shaft diameters available. Ideal for robotics, automation, and educational projects.

name: Character Figurine
description: Custom 3D printed figurine from your design or photo
fullDesc: Turn your character design, game avatar, or photo into a detailed 3D figurine. Printed in high-resolution resin for fine detail. Available in 10cm, 15cm, and 20cm heights. Delivered primed and ready to paint, or fully painted on request.

name: Solar System Model
description: Detailed scale model of the solar system for classrooms
fullDesc: An accurate scale model of the solar system with all 8 planets and the sun. Each planet is labeled and color-coded. Comes with a display stand. Great for schools, science fairs, and home learning. Printed in PLA with vibrant colors.

name: Planter Pot Set
description: Geometric planter pots for succulents and small plants
fullDesc: A set of 3 geometric planter pots in different sizes. Designed with drainage holes and a matching tray. Printed in weather-resistant PETG. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Available in terracotta, white, and charcoal.

name: Trophy & Award
description: Custom trophy with name, logo, and achievement text
fullDesc: Fully customizable trophy for sports, corporate events, and competitions. Add a name, logo, date, and achievement text. Printed in gold or silver PLA with a weighted base for stability. Available in 3 sizes.

name: Prototype Enclosure
description: Custom enclosures for electronics and PCB projects
fullDesc: Custom-designed enclosures for Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and other electronics projects. Printed in ABS for heat resistance. Includes cutouts for ports, buttons, and displays as per your design. Snap-fit or screw-mount assembly options available.
